about.title: About
about.subtitle: Who I am and what I work on.
about.body: I'm Ömer — an independent software engineer. I work on AI-driven, spec-driven architecture: libraries and platforms that help enterprise teams turn precise specifications into correct, testable systems. Alongside that, I design and build products that make complex work feel simple. This is a placeholder bio — edit it in the message files to say exactly what you want, in every language.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.subtitle: Have a project, a role, or an idea to discuss? Send a note — I read everything.
contact.messagePlaceholder: What would you like to build or discuss?
contact.success: Thanks — your message is on its way. I'll get back to you soon.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again, or email me directly.

cta.title: Have a project in mind?
cta.subtitle: I'm open to consulting, collaborations, and building something new together.

footer.tagline: Independent engineer. AI-driven, spec-driven architecture and products, built in the open.
